l7:ResourceSet.l7:Resource:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <wsp:Policy xmlns:L7p="http://www.layer7tech.com/ws/policy" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2002/12/policy"> <wsp:All wsp:Usage="Required"> <!-- TLS with client cert --> <L7p:SslAssertion> <L7p:RequireClientAuthentication booleanValue="true"/> <L7p:TlsVersion stringValue="TLSv1.3"/> </L7p:SslAssertion>
<!-- JWT authentication --> <L7p:DecodeJsonWebToken> <L7p:SourceVariable stringValue="request.http.header.Authorization"/> <L7p:TargetVariable stringValue="jwt.claims"/> <L7p:ValidateSignature booleanValue="true"/> </L7p:DecodeJsonWebToken>
<!-- Set context variable --> <L7p:SetVariable> <L7p:VariableToSet stringValue="order.region"/> <L7p:Expression stringValue="${jwt.claims.region}"/> <L7p:DataType stringValue="string"/> </L7p:SetVariable>
<!-- SQL injection protection --> <L7p:SqlAttackProtection> <L7p:IncludeUrl booleanValue="true"/> <L7p:IncludeBody booleanValue="true"/> <L7p:IncludeUrlQueryString booleanValue="true"/> </L7p:SqlAttackProtection>
<!-- Code injection protection --> <L7p:CodeInjectionProtection> <L7p:IncludeUrlPath booleanValue="true"/> <L7p:IncludeBody booleanValue="true"/> <L7p:HtmlJavaScriptInjection booleanValue="true"/> <L7p:ShellInjection booleanValue="true"/> </L7p:CodeInjectionProtection>
<!-- Request size limit --> <L7p:RequestSizeLimit> <L7p:MaxSize intValue="5242880"/> </L7p:RequestSizeLimit>
<!-- Conditional routing based on region --> <L7p:ComparisonAssertion> <L7p:Expression1 stringValue="${order.region}"/> <L7p:Expression2 stringValue="eu"/> <L7p:Operator stringValue="EQUALS"/> <L7p:CaseSensitive booleanValue="false"/> </L7p:ComparisonAssertion>
<!-- JavaScript transformation --> <L7p:JavaScript> <L7p:ScriptName stringValue="order-enrichment"/> <L7p:Script stringValue="var order = JSON.parse(context.getVariable('request.http.body')); order.timestamp = new Date().toISOString(); order.gateway_processed = true; order.correlation_id = context.getVariable('request.id'); context.setVariable('request.http.body', JSON.stringify(order));"/> <L7p:ExecutionTimeout intValue="5000"/> </L7p:JavaScript>
<!-- JSON schema validation --> <L7p:JsonSchemaAssertion> <L7p:ResourceUrl stringValue="schemas/order-schema.json"/> <L7p:Target stringValue="REQUEST"/> </L7p:JsonSchemaAssertion>
<!-- Regex extraction --> <L7p:Regex> <L7p:Regex stringValue="order-(\d+)"/> <L7p:AutoTarget booleanValue="true"/> <L7p:CaptureVar stringValue="order.id"/> </L7p:Regex>
<!-- ForEach loop for items --> <L7p:ForEachLoop> <L7p:LoopVariable stringValue="order.items"/> <L7p:VariablePrefix stringValue="item"/> <L7p:IterationLimit intValue="50"/> </L7p:ForEachLoop>
<!-- Add tracking headers --> <L7p:AddHeader> <L7p:HeaderName stringValue="X-Correlation-Id"/> <L7p:HeaderValue stringValue="${request.id}"/> <L7p:Target stringValue="request"/> </L7p:AddHeader>
<L7p:AddHeader> <L7p:HeaderName stringValue="X-Gateway-Region"/> <L7p:HeaderValue stringValue="${order.region}"/> <L7p:Target stringValue="request"/> </L7p:AddHeader>
<!-- Route to orders backend --> <L7p:HttpRoutingAssertion> <L7p:ProtectedServiceUrl stringValue="https://orders-service.internal:8443/api/v1/orders"/> <L7p:TlsVersion stringValue="TLSv1.3"/> <L7p:ConnectionTimeout intValue="10000"/> <L7p:Timeout intValue="45000"/> <L7p:FollowRedirects booleanValue="false"/> </L7p:HttpRoutingAssertion>
<!-- Audit --> <L7p:AuditDetailAssertion> <L7p:Detail stringValue="Order API: ${request.http.method} ${request.http.uri} - region=${order.region}"/> <L7p:Level stringValue="INFO"/> </L7p:AuditDetailAssertion>
<!-- Custom error response for failures --> <L7p:CustomizeErrorResponse> <L7p:Content stringValue='{"error": "Order processing failed", "correlation_id": "${request.id}"}'/> <L7p:ContentType stringValue="application/json"/> <L7p:HttpStatus intValue="500"/> </L7p:CustomizeErrorResponse> </wsp:All> </wsp:Policy>
